notes: Compound: Umwelt (environment) + Schutz (protection). No plural form in common usage.

sentences.german: Umweltschutz ist eines der wichtigsten Themen unserer Zeit.
sentences.english: Environmental protection is one of the most important issues of our time.

sentences.german: Die Regierung hat neue Gesetze zum Umweltschutz eingeführt.
sentences.english: The government has introduced new laws for environmental protection.

cloze_sentences.english: Environmental protection is one of the most important topics.
